sources.title: SIROCCO (BOGART)
sources.description: Noir thriller staring Humphrey Bogart with Lee J. Cobb and Zero Mostel.

metadata.Plot: In 1925 Damascus Harry Smith runs guns to the rebels under Emir Hassan. The French arrest him along with others and force him to sell weapons to them. He develops an interest in French intelligence officer Feroud's mistress Violette.
metadata.Writer: A.I. Bezzerides, Hans Jacoby, Joseph Kessel
metadata.Actors: Humphrey Bogart, Lee J. Cobb, Märta Torén
